calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-12-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-16-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Settlement on the Record and Default Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tina Paxton.
Susan Parkinson, Esq. for for Plaintiff: Lawrence Saw, also present, was sworn and direct examined. Defendant: Paul Celestino, present in pro per. No appearance by the Defaulted Co-Defendant: Brian Baird. Settlement as to Defendant: Celestino, read into record as follows: Judgment favor the Plaintiff for restitutiona and possession of 1010 Bush #126, San Francisco, Damages of $3,299.00, stayed until noon of Jan. 3, 2006, or as long as Defendant exclude any guess to the property. Waived security deposit and each to bear own fees and costs. Parties agreed to terms.
Default Prove-Up as to Co-Defendant: Brian Baird.
Exhibit 1---Rental agreement ------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Three day notice ------------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Brian Baird as follows:
Lease is forfeited.
Damages $3,299.00.
Counsel to prepare Judgment, and stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court.

Dec. 16, 2005
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.
